ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intents" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this intent belongs to */,
  "intent_name" TEXT /* Name of the intent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the intent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the intent was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifiers" (
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classifier */,
  "classifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the classifier */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the classifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classifier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classifier was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encodings" (
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encoding method */,
  "encoding_name" TEXT /* Name of the encoding method */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the encoding method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the encoding method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the encoding method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the encoding method was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encoding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "classifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classifier used in the model */,
  "encoding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the encoding method used in the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to train the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_encoding_id FOREIGN KEY ("encoding_id") REFERENCES encodings ("encoding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_classifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("classifier_id") REFERENCES classifiers ("classifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intent */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model for the intent */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model for the intent */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model for the intent */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the intent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model/dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model/dataset was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intent */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model for the intent */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model for the intent */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model for the intent */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the intent */,
  "evaluated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was evaluated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance history was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intent */,
  "version_id" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the dataset for the intent */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the dataset for the intent */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the dataset for the intent */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support (number of instances) for the intent */,
  "evaluated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance was evaluated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance history was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_performance_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_performance_history_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being evaluated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the dataset is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the deployment was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_deployments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
